common.footer: LobsterPool v0.1 | A simple way to create OpenClaw workspaces
common.name: Name

layout.launchpadDescription: Enter your API key and Mattermost token, then create an OpenClaw workspace in minutes.
layout.sectionInstancesNote: See all your workspaces, their current status, and the address when one is ready.
layout.sectionTemplatesNote: Browse the template options and pick the one that best fits your use case.
layout.sectionAdminNote: Track users, inspect every provisioned workspace, and manage the template catalog from one protected surface.
layout.sectionCreateNote: Just enter a name, choose a template, and provide your API key and Mattermost token.
layout.sectionDetailNote: Check the current status, address, and basic information for this workspace.
layout.adminStationNote: This surface is restricted to administrators. Use it to oversee users, workspaces, and the shared template supply.

instance.title: Instances
instance.subtitle: See all your OpenClaw workspaces in one place, along with status and access details.
instance.createSubtitle: Enter the basics and your two tokens. LobsterPool will take care of the setup for you.
instance.confirmDeleteDetail: Delete this instance and all K8s resources?
instance.totalCountCopy: Every workspace you have created so far.
instance.activeCountCopy: Workspaces that are ready to use right now.
instance.publishedCountCopy: Workspaces that already have a reachable address.
instance.templateCoverageCopy: How many different templates your workspaces are using.
instance.registryHint: Check the name, status, address, and creation time from one place.
instance.registryPolling: The details page refreshes automatically so you can wait for a workspace to become ready.
instance.emptyCopy: Create your first OpenClaw workspace and it will appear here once setup starts.
instance.specCopy: This form is intentionally simple. Pick a name, choose a template, then enter your two tokens.
instance.checklistNameCopy: Choose a name that makes sense to you when you come back later.
instance.checklistTemplateCopy: Templates give you different workspace setups. Just pick the one that fits best.
instance.checklistSecretsCopy: Enter your model API key and Mattermost token. The system handles the rest.
instance.securityCopy: For safety, your keys are not shown again after creation.
instance.formCopy: Fill in the fields below, then click create.
instance.formNote: After creation, you can return to the list or details page to watch the status update.
instance.limitReachedCopy: This account has already used all {{count}} available instance slots. Ask an administrator to raise the limit or delete an existing instance first.
instance.limitReachedFormNote: This account has reached its current instance quota. The create action is disabled until capacity is available again.
instance.detailSubtitle: See the current status, address, and basic information for this workspace.
instance.detailEmptyCopy: The requested instance could not be loaded. It may have been deleted or the identifier is stale.
instance.runtimeCopy: See the name, template, and creation time for this workspace.
instance.infraCopy: Use this section to check the current address and related connection details.
instance.secretsCopy: Your credentials have been provided, but they stay hidden for safety.

template.title: Templates
template.subtitle: Templates shape the overall workspace setup. Pick the one that matches what you need.
template.totalCountCopy: How many templates are ready to choose from.
template.imageFamiliesCopy: How many different sources the current templates come from.
template.deploymentReadyCopy: Templates that can be used right away to create a workspace.
template.catalogCopy: Read the short descriptions and choose the template that fits your workspace best.
template.emptyCopy: Add template records on the backend before provisioning new workspaces.

auth.networkError: Network error or backend service is unavailable
auth.title: Enter your keys. We handle the setup.
auth.subtitle: After signing in, you only need a template, your model API key, and your Mattermost token to create a workspace.
auth.operationsCopy: The goal is a simple customer flow. You fill in the basics, and the system handles the setup steps for you.
auth.operationsCard1Copy: Provide your model API key and Mattermost token so the workspace can be prepared.
auth.operationsCard2Copy: Once you choose a template, the system prepares the workspace for you.
auth.operationsCard3Copy: When setup is finished, you can see the status and address in the workspace list.
auth.panelSubtitle: Sign in or register to create and manage your OpenClaw workspaces.
auth.trustNote: Your keys are used to create the workspace and remain hidden afterward for safety.
auth.defaultAdminCopy: The system now creates a built-in administrator account: username `admin`, password `admin`. Change this password immediately after the first login.
auth.changePasswordCopy: Set a new password for the current account.
auth.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match
auth.forcePasswordChangeCopy: This account is still using the default bootstrap password. Set a new password before continuing.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: A protected operational surface for auditing users, scanning the full workspace fleet, and publishing templates without leaking authority into regular user flows.
admin.securityCopy: This page is protected by route guards on the client and explicit role checks on the backend API.
admin.totalUsersCopy: All accounts currently known to LobsterPool.
admin.adminUsersCopy: How many accounts can access this panel.
admin.totalInstancesCopy: All provisioned workspaces across every user.
admin.runningInstancesCopy: Workspaces currently reporting a running state.
admin.briefingCopy: The goal is strict separation: admins get global oversight and catalog management, while regular users remain scoped to their own workspaces.
admin.briefingUsersCopy: Review who is in the system, what role they hold, and how many workspaces they own.
admin.briefingInstancesCopy: See every workspace, its owner, and current status without relying on user-level screens.
admin.briefingTemplatesCopy: Only administrators can add new templates, which removes the current privilege leak from the common catalog path.
admin.templateFormCopy: Create a new template record that will appear in the shared catalog for all authenticated users.
admin.templateDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the template's purpose and default runtime profile.
admin.userRegistryCopy: A server-side view of every account, including role, owned workspace count, and the per-user instance limit.
admin.instanceRegistryCopy: A complete list of provisioned workspaces with owners and status.
admin.instanceLimitInvalid: Please enter a valid instance limit
